from.note: RunPod-branch session, MPI-156 (resumed from handoff a57fe80c)

subject: MPI-156 cu124 (Option A) build did NOT finish — re-running it; did your lane touch the build / mpi-ci Dockerfile?
body: Picking MPI-156 back up from handoff a57fe80c. The cu124 (Option A: cuda12.6 base + torch 2.8.0+cu126) image build that was in flight as background task bk1yutk3y did NOT complete. Ground truth: `docker manifest inspect ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.10.3-cu124` => manifest unknown, and there is NO local v0.10.3-cu124 image (only v0.10.3-cu128 from ~4h ago + the v0.10.2/v0.10.1 pairs). The captured build log ends mid-pip-install of ComfyUI requirements (step #8), BEFORE the per-profile torch-2.8 pin / sage build / tag / push — so it died at the session boundary. I'm going to re-run the local cu124 build (user-gated). QUESTION before I double-build: did your lane re-trigger or finish that build after the session boundary, or touch c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/Dockerfile? If yes, tell me. Otherwise I proceed with a fresh build. No action needed on your remote preview-flow work — that's unblocked and unrelated.

recent_events.reply: Other agent confirmed no double-build + build cmd params. Thread closed.
